textByHashes.54ef30a524380c51dbba4cd9f274c68618b7edf8: Look miss I got the goods if you have the cash.
textByHashes.37345ada66ba44ff2e401872f78beae160544246: Look pal I got the goods if you have the cash.
textByHashes.ecd509110a1870dff112c2c60dcdd878207b1538: We talkin' the same language yet?
textByHashes.04a6e8a43cb36b206e4ddfd86be4436223aa140b: The sort of stuff you use in brewing.
textByHashes.2e27fffa486ae18c6252561bfacd3847af5ad894: The sort of stuff the Cooking Guild banned last year.
textByHashes.dc57dd9b31660928f944c434abff8a03b9389280: The sort of stuff that (if added to a vat of brewing ingredients just before the hops) has a higher chance of producin' a mature batch of whatever ale you wanted to make.
textByHashes.14f8c6df36846138e17e66099a282d9200649683: I said, it's the sort of Stuff you add to a brewing vat after you have put the water and barley malt in.
textByHashes.eed6bcd7c430cd0dd4824045ed314964d7203405: THEN you add the sort of stuff I'm talking about, followed by the hops and the yeast.
textByHashes.60b33ebae4fe7325ccda1deb4a7f55b0b5aca465: Then, when whatever you are making brews it will have a higher chance of being a mature batch of ale.
textByHashes.7969b135a77e65ad7b709031fcf4721bad35ed68: That clear enough for you or am I going to have to start drawin' pictures on the wall of the hut?
textByHashes.6fa7d5e8367f99f894327bc8048c7447016d94dd: I might be, you got something for me?
textByHashes.74a7014d04822697f223d23286a13befeaa5c796: Look, I might have a little something for you for that amount of cash, but I'll have to check.
textByHashes.650336df8b8cd2d47c5bcd47ab786d4512dca11c: You sure you want in on this?
textByHashes.d5c01dcbe0b2a227cc297cc7360d1ba131379915: Ok, there you go, now try and keep this to yourself, ok?
textByHashes.8245365f8c454cde20ac1ed617daa069e2886e1d: Look, you want something or not?
textByHashes.1e051560735e4bfb607efb821f91365737b5f761: Are you here for the stuff?
textByHashes.6cef4136608ee5ffa94f35990a643236bbe2f8b0: Sorry, no hats allowed. Shove it in the deposit box if you want to play.
textByHashes.cb9629cf4ab20da1c4b2449cb834297b99d4d61c: Cos it's one of the rules, you got a problem with rules?
textByHashes.76085a49154bfec9a59007266b0b8b530a4db6f2: But still, no hats. They give you a hat to show what team you are on, and if you got a hat on, it might get nicked, see?
textByHashes.022e9b368d68733300e39235bca33eea7919a553: Might want to dump that stuff yer holdin'.
textByHashes.aae39f285aeaf46826c90fb589e378386923d13c: Well, if you are carrying anything in there, then it might get damaged. Burned up, that kind of thing.
textByHashes.b3de7c4d30a63ee26df23f9a643dfb524391cf33: You might want to put it in the bank, nice and safe like.
textByHashes.d29ea893822368ca436f6af0deaa9ddbc66eea3d: Yep, they might get into the brew, and I know a few pirates that are allergic to them.
textByHashes.44702f80c6428aa0120fcfc61e1ff527dbf09c44: Then you don't get in. Cooking 40 or over, Cooking Guild regulations, if you catch my drift.
textByHashes.439d21d841112293fc5415544ccfce114830f241: Well, I'm not sayin' anything to anyone unless they have decent cookin' skills.
textByHashes.25e15f24a6a83e09eb0b8afdfc4fd6ebabaa4ae9: I figured, seeing as I can see you over there! I don't make deals like this.
textByHashes.f56b1259087849b6c8dab528c5165bff5ccb6fcf: The sooner you get out of my head the better. So, you here for the... information?
textByHashes.4752ac0037e462a260648472f691b83059e81dee: Look miss, you interrupted me for a reason, you must be after something.
textByHashes.f88ae088e6ddee49dac419b1b347aa33a05dba0b: Look pal, you interrupted me for a reason, you must be after something.
textByHashes.ce3d22dcf8b3838c8da0d74871ed3dcfc5c69023: Ah, that's information I can help yer with.
textByHashes.a65449d2f028bcdd5e7b3b70ae0f3092f7afdf19: A game is ready to start just as soon as there are enough people.
textByHashes.309cd21bc3222597399d2bb89e9c74b82e9a9bc2: There are people on Dan's team, and on San's. There needs to be one on each in order for a game to start!
textByHashes.bfba2f4387fc4c0db4fcbb51dec7afb8b81dac5a: There's a game on at the moment, and another will be starting in minutes time!
textByHashes.c112660453619bd43ac05042d5b1356a32c1a763: A game has just ended, and another will be starting in minutes time!
textByHashes.78610cb3d614d9543a5b3d1eacab004238495368: No-one's waiting at the moment. Perhaps you can get some people interested.
textByHashes.d2fcdd276c4b6007a40ea0c54a5a76b2844a59d3: There is no one on Dan's team...
textByHashes.c4ea0b62557d0f4d3248ef9f8b4bb739ee617984: There are] no one on Dan's team...
textByHashes.3968e3e9a21f847cf60f4736f50a1fa717f957d9: There is one person on Dan's team...
textByHashes.0ca8ffe288c8d6aa1c78a353f206f812e147ced3: There are] one person on Dan's team...
textByHashes.c08dc6b3c7158869d86b40d59c0da889ed42e636: There is X people on Dan's team...
textByHashes.ebc183d8e73da2d09b3e4ed6b8166acc94147d3b: There are] X people on Dan's team...
textByHashes.6eccb7d7c66d4620d26b44e8693c7488ba4d876b: ... and there is no one on San's team. Anything else?
textByHashes.8ee05c3e5d9485416cd563f63c708ba133a25382: ... and there are] no one on San's team. Anything else?
textByHashes.eee901ff4f5f7c6c2bda528bb85ded2cb51bbe35: ... and there is one person on San's team. Anything else?
textByHashes.02862d545d858c0c0041f752353b245804edd5cb: ... and there are] one person on San's team. Anything else?
textByHashes.981d2dab6580a7e46c9f7d2a578a4fb4af2a2e2e: ... and there is X people on San's team. Anything else?
textByHashes.29b3d2359999f3a21cce3ea6f6ceefc086d0f60a: ... and there are] X people on San's team. Anything else?
